prompt: A hyper-realistic editorial magazine cover in the style of Forbes, photographed as a formal indoor business portrait. A confident young woman named MIRA sits centered in a beige upholstered armchair in a luxurious modern interior with dark stone or wood walls and a softly blurred plant in the background. She has long, voluminous, softly wavy dark brown hair with a middle part, light warm skin, and a poised, calm expression. She wears a fitted black dress, a black blazer, and a delicate gold necklace with a small oval pendant. Her posture is elegant and composed, seated slightly back in the chair with one arm relaxed on the armrest. Use warm cinematic lighting with soft highlights on the hair and face, shallow depth of field, premium color grading, and sharp fashion-editorial detail. Design the image as a complete magazine cover with large white serif masthead reading Forbes across the top, small uppercase date text "MAY 2025" in the top right, and the left-side feature line "30 UNDER 30" in a refined serif layout with the number 30 repeated large. Add left-column small cover text: "MEET THE NEXT GENERATION OF GAME CHANGERS RESHAPING THE FUTURE." Add a large lower-left headline in pale yellow serif text: MIRA. Beneath it, add the subheadline: "FOUNDER. CREATOR. VISIONARY." Add another lower-left text block: "BUILDING BRANDS. INSPIRING MILLIONS. DEFINING THE FUTURE." On the right side, add the stacked headline: "YOUNG ENOUGH TO CHANGE THE WORLD" and below it another text block: "BOLD IDEAS. REAL IMPACT. BOUNDLESS POTENTIAL." Keep the layout balanced, luxurious, aspirational, and authentically like a high-end business magazine cover.
